prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNI-ZIP-CABLE-PARENT Product Type: CABLE_TIE Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 100pk 12in White Universal Utility Cable Zip Tie Cable 4MM 8MM Thickness Description: These Universal Cable Ties will come in handy around the house, garage and office. Perhaps even while repairing nets from our experience. Keep cables, wires, hoses and more neatly together with these zip ties. Coming in packs of 100, you'll be able to keep things organized anywhere. They span from 40lbs to 110lbs strength, and come in various thicknesses.
Colors: Black or White
Tensile Strength & Thickness: 40lbs, 3.2mm | 50lbs, 4.2mm | 110lbs, 7.2mm
Easily organize wires, cables or hoses Search Terms: zipties black re-usable large small assorted sizes big reuseable plastic reusable for bikes Features: - Colors: Black & White - Tensile Strength & Thickness: - 40lbs, 3.2mm | 50lbs, 4.2mm | 110lbs, 8mm - Easily organize wires, cables or hoses === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 100-pk 12in White Cable Zip Ties

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 100-pk 12in White Cable Zip Tie

anthropic.title_differentiation: 40Lbs To 110Lbs Tensile Strength, Multiple Thicknesses, Reusable, Organizes Wires And Cables

openai.title_differentiation: 40 To 110 Lb Tensile Strength, Black And White Options, Organizes Wires Cables Hoses, Home Garage Office And Nets
